scores.notes: Minor OCR errors such as 'Kuvalis 1qck' instead of likely 'Kuvalis 1qck' (unclear if '1qck' is correct model name), and a dash '-' in some 'Fail' columns instead of blank or N/A. Table columns mostly preserved but some misalignment in 'Fail' and 'N/A' columns with dashes and checkmarks. Dates and IDs appear accurate. Layout and reading order are well maintained. Overall, the extraction is very good with minor text and table alignment issues.
